methods.score50_crossing: Interpolated latitude where score crosses 50; if multiple crossings, keep crossing with strongest local slope.
methods.max_gradient: Latitude of strongest absolute meridional score gradient between 15N and 75N.
methods.gradient_centroid: Gradient-weighted average latitude where score is between 20 and 80.
methods.profile_shift_correlation: Latitude shift needed to align each longitude profile against the westernmost profile.
